creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan from comment #0)

www/xpi-quick-locale-switcher was removed in 2019: 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=146b316531e8cae9d8961bb5da4de17e5e175a54>


Ivan, please: does there remain a language preference issue? If not, you can close this bug i.e. overcome by events. 

Thank you.
